products.name: Peregrine UAV Ballistic Parachute System
products.descriptor: CO2-ballistic UAV parachute canister deployment system

evidence.snippet: If you do not have this system, you can learn more about the [Peregrine UAV Ballistic Parachute System, its features, and how it works.](uav_rpv_drone_recovery_parachutes/peregrine_uav_ballistic_parachute_system "Peregrine UAV Ballistic Parachute System")

![Ballistic Peregrine Parachute Launcher with Hawk CO2 Release and Parachute](/images/home_images/product_line/product_line_ballistic.jpg)
### Ballistic Parachute
Deployment Systems

products.name: SATS-MINI (Sentinel Automatic Trigger System)
products.descriptor: IMU/barometer-based automatic parachute deployment trigger for drones

evidence.snippet:
Sentinel Automatic Trigger System
(SATS-MINI)
Quick Start Guide and Resources
*   **[Purchase the SATS-MINI](https://shop.fruitychutes.com/collections/drone-electronics/products/sats-mini-sentinel-automatic-trigger-system)**

### Harrier Drone Parachutes
The Harrier Drone Parachute Launcher raises the bar for low cost, lightweight, easy to use, efficient, and cost effective spring actuated parachute launchers. No other drone parachute launcher compares to the Harrier!
*   [Purchase the Harrier Drone Parachute Launcher](https://shop.fruitychutes.com/collections/harrier-launchers-1-27-kg-to-12-4-kg "Purchase the Harrier Drone Parachute Launcher")

products.name: Skycat UAV Parachute System
products.descriptor: Drone parachute bundle combining Iris Ultra parachute with Skycat spring launcher

evidence.snippet:
### Skycat Drone Parachutes
These bundles combine our Iris Ultra Light parachutes with a Harrier or Skycat spring-based parachute launcher for drones up to 12.8kg. The systems are lightweight, strong and will exhibit high performance when compared to the drone’s weight. These systems have no shipping restrictions and can be shipped worldwide.

![Skycat Drone Parachute Launcher mounted on a quadcopter](images/skycat/Skycat_Drone_Parachute_System_X55_01.jpg)
Use these resources for help with the Skycat launcher bundle and other Skycat products.
*   [Purchase the Skycat Drone Parachute Launcher](https://shop.fruitychutes.com/collections/skycat-launchers-2-5-kg-to-20-kg "Purchase the Skycat Drone Parachute Launcher")

products.name: SATS-M6
products.descriptor: Advanced automatic parachute trigger system with 6-channel GPIO support

evidence.snippet:
### **[Download Version 2.0.4](files/sats/software-downloads/ShootyChute_2.0.4.zip)** - Production Release for New SATS-M6
**Updates for version 2.0.4 -** This update adds support for the new V3.0 SATS-M6. The new SATS-M6 will be able to support 6 GPIO channels in an upcoming release. This version supports the current 4 GPIO channels like the SATS-MINI. Version 2.0.4 also supports the SATS-MINI.

products.name: Iris Ultralight Parachutes
products.descriptor: Lightest toroidal UAV recovery parachute family, 65% lighter than Iris Ultra Standard

evidence.snippet:
### [Iris Ultralight](https://shop.fruitychutes.com/collections/iris-ultralight-parachutes "Iris Ultralight Parachutes")
**
Sizes: 30" to 168" (14’)
65% Lighter than
Iris Ultra Standard

Optimized for light weight, the Iris Ultralight parachute is ideal for UAS applications, including multirotor drones, fixed wing, VTOL and more.
Our lightest custom Spectra and nylon make the Iris Ultralight the ultimate choice for systems aiming to achieve the lowest possible weight.

products.name: Raven On-Landing Parachute Release (ROPR)
products.descriptor: Patent-pending mechanical device that auto-releases parachute from UAV upon landing

evidence.snippet: The Raven On-Landing Parachute Release (ROPR) is a patent pending device that allows a parachute to be automatically released from a payload upon landing. This mitigates possible damage caused by wind that could otherwise drag a valuable payload after landing.

We soft-launched this innovative device in January 2021. We have since completed design finalizations and testing and have expanded production. Please **[contact us](parachuteapi.js)** for pricing and availability.

products.name: Iris Ultra Compact Parachutes
products.descriptor: High-strength, minimum-volume toroidal parachute family for UAV applications

evidence.snippet:
### [Iris Ultra Compact](https://shop.fruitychutes.com/collections/iris-ultra-compact-chutes "Iris Ultra Compact Parachutes")
**
Sizes: 30" to 240” (20’)
35% Lighter than
Iris Ultra Standard

Built for high strength and low volume, the Iris Ultra Compact is designed to be as compact as possible to fit into small spaces.
These parachutes are ideal for all UAV applications and any application where weight and packing volume are critical.

products.name: Hawk CO2 Release
products.descriptor: All-mechanical CO2 release valve for parachute canister pressurization, no pyro required

evidence.snippet:
Hawk CO2 Release
----------------
The [Hawk CO2 Release](https://shop.fruitychutes.com/products/hawk-co2-system-kit-16-to-45-gram?_pos=1&_sid=35135a0b5&_ss=r "Hawk CO2 Release"), pictured below, is an all mechanical system that requires no pyro consumables in order to operate, so it does not have regulatory issues and can be used world wide. Download the [Hawk Users Guide](files/hawk/Fruity-Chutes-Hawk-CO2-Release-Instructions.pdf "Hawk CO2 Release Instructions").

products.name: Iris Ultra Standard Parachutes
products.descriptor: Toroidal parachute family with high efficiency and small packing volume, 36–120 in sizes

evidence.snippet:
### [Iris Ultra Standard](https://shop.fruitychutes.com/collections/iris-ultra-standard-chutes "Iris Ultra Standard Parachutes")
**
Sizes: 36" to 120" (10’)
High Efficiency
Small Packing Volume
**
Our standard Iris Ultra parachute, ideal where high efficiency and small packing volume are key.
Applications include (but are not limited to) high power rocketry, research projects, and applications where weight is less critical.

products.name: Classic Elliptical Parachutes
products.descriptor: Semi-ellipsoid canopy parachute family with Cd 1.5–1.6, 12–60 inch sizes

evidence.snippet:
Classic Elliptical Parachute
Great Look and Great Performance
===============================================================
This is the parachute design where it all started in 2007. These chutes feature the classic semi-ellipsoid shape and have a Cd of 1.5 - 1.6. We generally keep inventory of these ready to ship. All [classic elliptical parachutes](https://shop.fruitychutes.com/collections/classic-elliptical-12-to-60 "Classic Elliptical Parachutes") combine our most popular color combinations.

products.name: Peregrine CO2 Deployment Device
products.descriptor: Tinder Rocketry CO2 release valve for 8–12 g cartridges, rocket parachute deployment

evidence.snippet: Peregrine CO2 Deployment Device

We have the Tinder Rocketry Peregrine CO2 Release Valve. This is similar to the Rouse Tech CD3 device but is re-engineered to take it up to the next level! This system supports 8 and 12 gram CO2 cartridges.

products.name: Peregrine Raptor CO2 Deployment Device
products.descriptor: Tinder Rocketry heavy-duty CO2 release valve for 23 g and larger cartridges

evidence.snippet: Peregrine Raptor CO2 Deployment Device
The Peregrine Raptor supports 23 gram and higher CO2 cartridges - perfect for big projects.

unresolved_questions: Product detail pages for Peregrine UAV Ballistic, Skycat UAV, Harrier, Fixed Wing Recovery Bundle, DJI Drone Parachutes, and SATS-MINI were in the crawl_index but not fetched (skipped), so full specifications, weight ranges, compatible drone models, and pricing are unavailable from the corpus.

The SATS-M6 is referenced only in the SATS-MINI firmware release notes as a new hardware version; its dedicated product page was not fetched, so capabilities beyond '6 GPIO channels' and V3.0 hardware revision are unknown.
Peregrine CO2 Deployment Device and Peregrine Raptor are resold Tinder Rocketry products; NDAA/origin status for those third-party items is unconfirmed.
Skycat UAV Parachute System uses Skycat Technologies launchers (third-party, Israel-origin); NDAA status classified as unknown accordingly.
